LJCTableColumns.summary: Contains methods to complement a DataColumnCollection object.

ColumnNames.summary: Creates a PropertyNames list from a DataColumn collection.

Columns.summary: Returns a collection of DataColumns that match the supplied list.

HasColumns.summary: Checks the DataColumnCollection object for items.
HasColumns.returns: true if there are items; otherwise false.

ToDataColumns.summary: Creates an LJCDataColumns collection from a DataColumnCollection.
